'''Ylanda Captison''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was the daughter of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Dol Captison]] and [[Marga Captison]] and the sister of [[Gaeriel Captison]].

==Biography==
Like the rest of her family, she was a follower of the [[Cosmic Balance|Religion of the Cosmic Balance]] that dictated for every good, there had to be an equal bad (or vice-versa), lest the universe fall out of alignment.

As such, when in [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]] Gaeriel was chosen to attend the [[Bakur Senatorial Academy]] and eventually join the [[Bakuran Senate]], Dol and Marga gave Ylanda a golden alms bowl—since her sister would become a senator, to preserve the Cosmic Balance, Ylanda was to become a beggar.

Ylanda carried out the dictate of her parents and religion.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' {{1stm}}
